name: Breakfast Tortillas (Spicy)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown and crumble the sausage over medium heat until fully cooked.
2. Remove the sausage from the pan using a spatula and set aside, leaving the grease in the skillet.
3. Scramble the eggs in the same skillet. When the eggs are almost done cooking, add the crumbled sausage back into the skillet.
4. Continue scrambling until the mixture is thoroughly heated through.
5. Sprinkle shredded cheese over the top of the egg and sausage mixture. Cover with a lid and remove from heat to melt the cheese slightly.
6. Warm the tortillas in a separate pan or toaster oven until they are soft and pliable.
7. Assemble each tortilla by spooning the heated egg, sausage, and cheese mixture down the center.
8. Add salsa on top of the filling.
9. Fold up the bottom of the tortilla to enclose the contents.
10. Fold in the sides of the tortilla to create a neat package.
11. Serve immediately while warm.
